user.title: Setup Pyscript Updater
user.description: Sync pyscript files from GitHub. Maintain a manifest file inside your pyscript folder with one `url|dest[|recursive]` per line.

data.manifest_file: Manifest file (relative to pyscript dir or absolute)

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of Pyscript Updater is allowed.

init.title: Pyscript Updater Settings
init.description: Configure paths, update interval, and auto-update behavior.

reload.name: Reload pyscript sources
reload.description: Re-reads the manifest file and checks GitHub for updates immediately.

update_all.name: Update all pyscript files
update_all.description: Downloads and installs every available pyscript update.

backup.name: Create backup
backup.description: Create numbered backup files before overwriting.

restore_pyscript.name: Restore pyscript file
restore_pyscript.description: Restore a pyscript file from a numbered backup (.bak.1, .bak.2, ...).

entity_id.name: Pyscript entity
entity_id.description: The update entity of the pyscript file to restore.

version.name: Backup version
version.description: Which backup version to restore (1 = newest, 2 = older, ...).

missing_backup.message: Missing backup file. A backup may not have been created during the previous update.

invalid_version.message: Invalid backup version. Must be between 1 and the configured max backups.

common.content_missing: Remote content is missing or could not be fetched
